2604.13346.title: AgentSPEX: An Agent SPecification and EXecution Language
2604.13346.paper_summary: Language-model agent systems commonly rely on reactive prompting, in which a single instruction guides the model through an open-ended sequence of reasoning and tool-use steps, leaving control flow and intermediate state implicit and making agent behavior potentially difficult to control. Orchestration frameworks such as LangGraph, DSPy, and CrewAI impose greater structure through explicit workflow definitions, but tightly couple workflow logic with Python, making agents difficult to maintain and modify. In this paper, we introduce AgentSPEX, an Agent SPecification and EXecution Language for specifying LLM-agent workflows with explicit control flow and modular structure, along with a customizable agent harness. AgentSPEX supports typed steps, branching and loops, parallel execution, reusable submodules, and explicit state management, and these workflows execute within an agent harness that provides tool access, a sandboxed virtual environment, and support for checkpointing, verification, and logging. Furthermore, we provide a visual editor with synchronized graph and workflow views for authoring and inspection. We include ready-to-use agents for deep research and scientific research, and we evaluate AgentSPEX on 7 benchmarks. Finally, we show through a user study that AgentSPEX provides a more interpretable and accessible workflow-authoring paradigm than a popular existing agent framework.
2604.13346.paper_summary_zh: 語言模型代理系統通常依賴反應式提示，其中單一指令引導模型通過開放式的推理和工具使用步驟，留下控制流程和中間狀態隱含，使得代理行為可能難以控制。像 LangGraph、DSPy 和 CrewAI 這樣的協調框架通過明確的工作流程定義施加更大的結構，但將工作流程邏輯與 Python 緊密耦合，使得代理難以維護和修改。在本文中，我們介紹了 AgentSPEX，一種代理規範和執行語言，用於指定具有明確控制流程和模組化結構的 LLM-代理工作流程，以及一個可自定義的代理工具。AgentSPEX 支持類型化步驟、分支和循環、並行執行、可重用子模組和明確的狀態管理，這些工作流程在提供工具訪問、沙盒虛擬環境以及支持檢查點、驗證和日誌記錄的代理工具內執行。此外，我們提供了一個具有同步圖形和工作流程視圖的可視化編輯器，用於創作和檢查。我們包括了可即用的代理，用於深入研究和科學研究，並在 7 個基準上評估了 AgentSPEX。最後，我們通過用戶研究顯示，AgentSPEX 提供了一種比流行的現有代理框架更具可解釋性和可訪問性的工作流程創作範式。
2604.13346.author: Pengcheng Wang et.al.
2604.13346.authors: Pengcheng Wang, Jerry Huang, Jiarui Yao, Rui Pan, Peizhi Niu, Yaowenqi Liu, Ruida Wang, Renhao Lu, Yuwei Guo, Tong Zhang
